privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the official HEC-RAS Muncie example project (White River, Indiana) and uses data from a 2D unsteady flow simulation stored in the `Muncie.p04.hdf` file. The geometry data contains exactly one 2D flow area named '2D Interior Area' with exactly 5,765 computational cells. Running the provided `analyze_peak_wse.py` script against the correct simulation results produces 289 timesteps of data. The true Overall Peak WSE is exactly 953.840, occurring at timestep 0 in cell index 5756. The true Mean Peak WSE across all valid cells is approximately 946.104. The output CSV file generated by the script will therefore contain a single data row with these exact values: `2D Interior Area,953.840,0,5756,946.104,5765,289`. The agent is expected to successfully execute the script to generate this output in the `~/Documents/hec_ras_results/` directory.
